Compare two hospitals

Queen’s West Oʻahu × Queen’s Punchbowl · negotiated commercial prices from each hospital’s federally mandated machine-readable file · same code, same plan, side by side
Search a procedure to compare it.
Every price is the hospital’s own published negotiated rate for the selected plan (the minimum across a code’s billing-line variants when several exist — shown as “from”). Cash = the published self-pay dollar. “Not published for this item” means that hospital’s file carries no dollar for that code under that plan. Nothing is estimated, averaged or inferred.
